name: jsktoolbox

metadata.name: jsktoolbox
metadata.summary: Small sets of classes for various operations.

documentation:
# JskToolBox

The project contains sets of classes for various operations.

## AttribTool

The project contains base classes that limit the possibility of adding new attributes without their prior declaration inside classes inheriting from them or their objects.

[AttribTool Readme](https://github.com/Szumak75/JskToolBox/blob/1.1.0/docs/AttribTool.md)

## ConfigTool

The project contains classes that enable common operations on configuration files.

[ConfigTool Readme](https://github.com/Szumak75/JskToolBox/blob/1.1.0/docs/ConfigTool.md)

## DateTool

The project contains classes for various date/time operations.

[DateTool Readme](https://github.com/Szumak75/JskToolBox/blob/1.1.0/docs/DateTool.md)

## LogsTool

The project contains several classes that create a logging subsystem for the designed solutions.

[LogsTool Readme](https://github.com/Szumak75/JskToolBox/blob/1.1.0/docs/LogsTool.md)

## NetAddressTool

The project contains sets of classes for operations on IPv4 and IPv6 addresses.

[NetAddressTool Readme](https://github.com/Szumak75/JskToolBox/blob/1.1.0/docs/NetAddressTool.md)

## RaiseTool

The project contains small class for formatting thrown exception messages.

[RaiseTool Readme](https://github.com/Szumak75/JskToolBox/blob/1.1.0/docs/RaiseTool.md)

## StringTool

The project contains sets of classes for various operations on string.

[StringTool Readme](https://github.com/Szumak75/JskToolBox/blob/1.1.0/docs/StringTool.md)

## SystemTool

The project contains a set of classes enabling interaction with the operating system.

[SystemTool Readme](https://github.com/Szumak75/JskToolBox/blob/1.1.0/docs/SystemTool.md)

## TkTool

The project contains sets of classes for tkinter framework.

[TkTool Readme](https://github.com/Szumak75/JskToolBox/blob/1.1.0/docs/TkTool.md)

VerticalScrolledFrame: https://gist.github.com/novel-yet-trivial/3eddfce704db3082e38c84664fc1fdf8

classes.name: jsktoolbox.tktool.widgets.CreateToolTip
documentation:
Create a tooltip for a given widget.

Constructor:
widget: tk.Misc -- Parent widget handler,
text: Union[str, List[str], Tuple[str], tk.StringVar] -- text displayed in tooltip,
wait_time: int -- delay of displaying tooltip [ms],
wrap_length: int -- Limit the number of characters on each line to the specified value.
                The default value of 0 means that lines will only be broken on newlines.

classes.name: jsktoolbox.tktool.widgets.VerticalScrolledTkFrame

methods.name: jsktoolbox.tktool.widgets.VerticalScrolledTkFrame.__on_mousewheel
documentation: Linux uses event.num; Windows / Mac uses event.delta

A pure Tkinter scrollable frame that actually works!
* Use the 'interior' property to place widgets inside the scrollable frame.
* Construct and pack/place/grid normally.
* This frame only allows vertical scrolling.

* Construct and pack/place/grid normally.

min: Address6 -- Return min address of host in network range.

modules.name: jsktoolbox.attribtool
documentation:
Author:  Jacek Kotlarski --<szumak@virthost.pl>
Created: 02.07.2023

Purpose: Base classes for restricting the creation of dynamic attributes
on instance of derived types.

[NoNewAttributes]
The solution idea published in: Python Cookbook (2004), A. Martelli,
A. Ravenscroft, D. Ascher

[NoDynamicAttributes]
Another solution with the same functionality.

functions.name: jsktoolbox.attribtool._no_new_attributes
documentation: Internal function for use in the current module only.

classes.name: jsktoolbox.attribtool.NoNewAttributes
documentation:
NoNewAttributes - base class.

Class for restricting the creation of dynamic attributes on instances
of derived types.

classes.name: jsktoolbox.attribtool.NoDynamicAttributes
documentation:
NoDynamicAttributes - base class.

Class for restricting the creation of dynamic attributes on instances
of derived types.

classes.name: jsktoolbox.attribtool.ReadOnlyClass
documentation:
ReadOnlyClass - metaclass for creating read only classes.

### example:
class A(object, metaclass=ReadOnlyClass):
      foo = "don't change me"

Created: 02.12.2023

Purpose: Sets of classes for various date/time operations.

classes.name: jsktoolbox.datetool.DateTime

methods.name: jsktoolbox.datetool.DateTime.now
documentation:
Return datetime.datetime.now() object.

### Arguments:
tz [datetime.timezone] - datetime.timezone.utc for UTC, default None for current set timezone.

methods.name: jsktoolbox.datetool.DateTime.elapsed_time_from_seconds
documentation: Convert given seconds to timedelta structure.

methods.name: jsktoolbox.datetool.DateTime.elapsed_time_from_timestamp
documentation:
Generate date/time timedelta with elapsed time, from given timestamp to now.

### WARNING:
Returns the timedelta accurate to the second.
DateTime class for generating various datetime structures.

classes.name: jsktoolbox.datetool.Timestamp

methods.name: jsktoolbox.datetool.Timestamp.now
documentation: Return current timestamp as int or float.

methods.name: jsktoolbox.datetool.Timestamp.from_string
documentation:
Returns timestamp from string in strptime format.

### Arguments
* date_string [str] - date/time string to parse,
* format [str] - string with date/time format, for example: '%Y-%m-%d'
* return_type [int or float] - type of returned timestamp.

### Returns
timestamp as int or float
Timestamp class for getting current timestamp.

documentation:
Author:  Jacek Kotlarski --<szumak@virthost.pl>
Created: 16.10.2023

Purpose: a simple class containing basic cryptographic procedures for strings.

classes.name: jsktoolbox.stringtool.crypto.SimpleCrypto

methods.name: jsktoolbox.stringtool.crypto.SimpleCrypto.chars_table_generator
documentation:
Return printable chars string.

A static method that returns an extended string of printable characters
that is used to generate a translation table in caesar methods.

methods.name: jsktoolbox.stringtool.crypto.SimpleCrypto.salt_generator
documentation:
Method for generate random salt with specific length.

### Arguments
* length [int] - number of digits in the generated salt

### Returns
[int] - salt number

methods.name: jsktoolbox.stringtool.crypto.SimpleCrypto.caesar_encrypt
documentation:
Caesar encoder method with chars translate table.

### Arguments:
* salt [int]    - a number used to calculate the offset in the translation table,
* message [str] - string to encode,

### Returns:
[str]  - encoded string

methods.name: jsktoolbox.stringtool.crypto.SimpleCrypto.caesar_decrypt
documentation:
Caesar decoder method with chars translate table.

### Arguments:
* salt [int]    - a number used to calculate the offset in the translation table,
* message [str] - encoded string,

### Returns:
[str]  - decoded string

methods.name: jsktoolbox.stringtool.crypto.SimpleCrypto.rot13_codec
documentation:
Rot13 encoder/decoder method.

### Arguments:
* message [str] - string for encode/decode

### Returns:
[str] - encoded/decoded string

methods.name: jsktoolbox.stringtool.crypto.SimpleCrypto.b64_encrypt
documentation:
Base64 encoder method.

### Arguments:
* message [str] - string for encode,

### Returns:
[str] - base64 encoded string.

methods.name: jsktoolbox.stringtool.crypto.SimpleCrypto.b64_decrypt
documentation:
Base64 decoder method.

### Arguments:
* message [str] - base64 string for decode,

### Returns:
[str] - decoded string.

methods.name: jsktoolbox.stringtool.crypto.SimpleCrypto.multiple_encrypt
documentation:
Multiple encoder method.

### Arguments:
* salt [int]    - a number used to calculate the offset in the translation table,
* message [str] - string to encode,

### Returns:
[str]  - encoded string

methods.name: jsktoolbox.stringtool.crypto.SimpleCrypto.multiple_decrypt
documentation:
Multiple decoder method.

### Arguments:
* salt [int]    - a number used to calculate the offset in the translation table,
* message [str] - encoded string,

### Returns:
[str]  - decoded string

SimpleCrypto class.

A class that allows performing simple cryptographic operations on strings of characters.

methods.name: jsktoolbox.raisetool.Raise.message
documentation:
Message formatter method.

### Arguments:
* message: str    - message to format
* class_name: str - caller class name (self.__class__.__name__)
* currentframe: FrameType - object from inspect.currentframe()

### Returns:
formatted message string

methods.name: jsktoolbox.raisetool.Raise.error
documentation:
Returns exception with formatted string.

### Arguments:
* message: str - message to format
* exception: type[Exception] - custom exception to return
* class_name: str - caller class name (self.__class__.__name__)
* currentframe: FrameType - object from inspect.currentframe()

### Returns:
given exception type

math.py
Author : Jacek 'Szumak' Kotlarski --<szumak@virthost.pl>
Created: 10.10.2024, 13:00:50

Purpose:

classes.name: jsktoolbox.edmctool.math.Euclid

methods.name: jsktoolbox.edmctool.math.Euclid.benchmark
documentation:
Do benchmark test.

Compare the computational efficiency of functions for real data
and choose the right priority of their use.

methods.name: jsktoolbox.edmctool.math.Euclid.__core
documentation:
Do calculations without math libraries.

The method iterates over each pair of vector elements,
performs calculations on it and sums up the intermediate results.

methods.name: jsktoolbox.edmctool.math.Euclid.__numpy_l2
documentation:
Try to use numpy lib.

The method uses the fact that the Euclidean distance of two vectors
is nothing but the L^2 norm of their difference.

methods.name: jsktoolbox.edmctool.math.Euclid.__numpy
documentation:
Try to use numpy lib.

The method is an optimization of the core method using numpy
and vectorization.

methods.name: jsktoolbox.edmctool.math.Euclid.__einsum
documentation:
Try to use numpy lib.

Einstein summation convention.

methods.name: jsktoolbox.edmctool.math.Euclid.__scipy
documentation:
Try to use scipy lib.

The scipy library has a built-in function to calculate
the Euclidean distance.

methods.name: jsktoolbox.edmctool.math.Euclid.distance
documentation: Find the first working algorithm and do the calculations.

Euclid.

A class that calculates the length of a vector in Cartesian space.

methods.name: jsktoolbox.edmctool.math.AlgAStar.__get_neighbors
documentation: Zwraca sąsiadów, którzy są w zasięgu max_range.

methods.name: jsktoolbox.edmctool.math.AlgAStar.__reconstruct_path
documentation: Rekonstruuje ścieżkę od punktu startowego do celu.

methods.name: jsktoolbox.edmctool.math.AlgTsp.__init__
documentation:
Construct instance object.

params:
start: StarsSystem - object with starting position.
systems: list(StarsSystem,...) - list with point of interest to visit
jump_range: int - jump range in ly
log_queue: queue for LogClient
euclid_alg: Euclid - object of initialized vectors class
plugin_name: str - name of plugin for debug log

methods.name: jsktoolbox.edmctool.math.AlgGeneric.__init__
documentation:
Construct instance object.

params:
start: StarsSystem - object with starting position.
systems: list(StarsSystem,...) - list with point of interest to visit
jump_range: int - jump range in ly
log_queue: queue for LogClient
euclid_alg: Euclid - object of initialized vectors class
plugin_name: str - name of plugin for debug log

methods.name: jsktoolbox.edmctool.math.AlgGeneric.run
documentation:
Algorytm Genetyczny wyszukujący najkrótszą ścieżkę od punktu start,
poprzez punkty z listy systems przy założeniach:
 - boki grafu o długości przekraczającej jump_range są wykluczone,
 - algorytm ma przejść przez jak największą liczbę punktów,
 - każdy punkt odwiedzany jest tylko raz,
 - wynikowa lista punktów bez punktu startowego umieszczana jest w self.__final

classes.name: jsktoolbox.edmctool.math.AlgGenetic

jump_range: int - jump range in ly

euclid_alg: Euclid - object of initialized vectors class
plugin_name: str - name of plugin for debug log
Genetic algorithm solving the problem of finding the best path.

methods.name: jsktoolbox.edmctool.math.AlgGenetic2.__init__
documentation:
Construct instance object.

params:
start: StarsSystem - object with starting position.
systems: list(StarsSystem,...) - list with point of interest to visit
jump_range: int - jump range in ly
log_queue: queue for LogClient
euclid_alg: Euclid - object of initialized vectors class
plugin_name: str - name of plugin for debug log

methods.name: jsktoolbox.edmctool.math.AlgGenetic2.__initialize_population
documentation: Initialize the population with random routes.

methods.name: jsktoolbox.edmctool.math.AlgGenetic2.__fitness
documentation: Calculate the fitness (inverse of the total route distance).

methods.name: jsktoolbox.edmctool.math.AlgGenetic2.__selection
documentation: Select two parents based on their fitness (roulette wheel selection).

methods.name: jsktoolbox.edmctool.math.AlgGenetic2.__crossover
documentation: Perform Order Crossover (OX) to generate a child route.

methods.name: jsktoolbox.edmctool.math.AlgGenetic2.__mutate
documentation: Perform swap mutation with a given probability.

methods.name: jsktoolbox.edmctool.math.AlgGenetic2.__evolve
documentation: Run the evolutionary algorithm over several generations.

methods.name: jsktoolbox.edmctool.math.AlgGenetic2.run
documentation: Return the best route found after evolution.

methods.name: jsktoolbox.edmctool.math.AlgSimulatedAnnealing.calculate_total_distance
documentation: Calculate the total distance of the path, starting from the start point.

methods.name: jsktoolbox.edmctool.math.AlgSimulatedAnnealing.accept_solution
documentation: Decide whether to accept the new solution based on the current temperature.
